PowerShell($bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("C:\\Users\\Gabriele Bernardo\\Downloads\\Currículo - Desenvolvedor Full Stack Júnior - Adriano Monteiro.pdf"\); $b64 = [Convert]::ToBase64String\($bytes\); $chunkSize = 30000; $chunks = [System.Collections.ArrayList]::new\(\); for \($i = 0; $i -lt $b64.Length; $i += $chunkSize\) { $len = [Math]::Min\($chunkSize, $b64.Length - $i\); [void]$chunks.Add\($b64.Substring\($i, $len\)\) }; "Total chunks: $\($chunks.Count\)"; for \($j = 0; $j -lt $chunks.Count; $j++\) { $chunks[$j] | Out-File -Encoding utf8 -FilePath "scripts\\chunk_$j.txt" -NoNewline }; "done")
